subject: LV-RUN-2 — Append §13 changelog entry to runtime/current_state.md
body:
Per parent task LANE01-W1-LOOP-VALIDATION-V1 (V1.1 W1.6) Run 2: append a §13 changelog entry to `runtime/current_state.md` reflecting the loop validation in progress. This run is the **state-update intensive** test — verify aier-state-update produces idempotent regen output (run 2x same input → same output → no second write).

Deliverables:
1. Edit `runtime/current_state.md` — append 1 changelog row to §13 with date 2026-04-28, task LANE01-W1-LV-RUN2-RUNTIME-NOTE-V1, summary 'V1.1 W1.6 LOOP VALIDATION Run 2 — state-update idempotency test'.
2. Single commit + push.

Rollback: git revert the runtime-note commit.
requested_action: Lane_01 (CLAC-1) executor opens current_state.md, appends §13 changelog row, commits with [vercel skip], pushes; then aier-state-update invoked twice to verify idempotency; then aier-verify invoked to close the loop.
acceptance_criteria: runtime/current_state.md §13 changelog appended with LV-RUN-2 row
HEAD matches origin/main; worktree clean post-push
aier-state-update idempotent verified (same input → same output → identical hash)
No SKILL.md or METADATA.yaml of any skill modified (boundary: invoke only)
